name: Publish a KDP book (Jed only)
description: Hitting the KDP Publish button is irreversible — once live the book is on Amazon and pulling it requires customer-service intervention. ALWAYS Jed, never Solomon, never Caleb, never Sam.
trigger_examples: hit publish on motivation for tough guys
prompt_template: Tell Jed: 'KDP publish is yours alone — open kdp.amazon.com → Bookshelf → Motivation for Tough Guys → Save and Publish. Caleb has prepped the draft; you just need to click. Once you do, send me a one-liner and I'll log it to master context.'
escalation_conditions: always — this template never executes, only flags Jed
notes: Per master-context section 12: 'always get explicit approval before any legal, financial, or irreversible action.'
